goal_text:
You are planning your trip in Cambridge.
You are looking for a 'particular hotel'. Its name is called 'city centre north b and b'.
Once you find the 'hotel' you want to book it for '2 people' and '4 nights' starting from 'thursday'.
If the booking fails how about 'sunday'.
Make sure you get the 'reference number'.
You are also looking for a 'train'. The train should be on 'the same day as the hotel booking' and should depart from 'london kings cross'.
The train should 'arrive by 14:15' and should go to 'cambridge'.
Make sure you get 'departure time' and 'travel time'.Remember. You don't want booking for train. Just get the information and it all done.

message: You are planning your trip in Cambridge
You are looking for a particular hotel. Its name is called city centre north b and b
Once you find the hotel you want to book it for 2 people and 4 nights starting from thursday
If the booking fails how about sunday
Make sure you get the reference number
You are also looking for a train. The train should be on the same day as the hotel booking and should depart from london kings cross
The train should arrive by 14:15 and should go to cambridge
Make sure you get departure time and travel time

info.name: city centre north b and b
